ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ratings were recorded */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received for the year */,
  "mean_rating" REAL /* Mean rating for the year */,
  "se_rating" REAL /* Standard error of the mean rating */,
  "first_rating" TEXT /* Date of the first rating received in the year */,
  "last_rating" TEXT /* Date of the last rating received in the year */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, critic) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external factor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie affected by the factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the external factor */,
  "factor_value" TEXT /* Value or description of the factor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date when the factor was active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date when the factor was active */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of external factor (e.g., marketing campaign, theatrical release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_factors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend" TEXT /* Opening weekend box office gross */,
  "domestic_total" TEXT /* Domestic total box office gross */,
  "international_total" TEXT /* International total box office gross */,
  "worldwide_total" TEXT /* Worldwide total box office gross */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
